title: MLS Experiment Result
description: Schema for the JSON produced by scripts/eval_baseline.py --out and consumed by scripts/experiment.py

experiment_id.description: Slug derived from the --out filename stem; unique per run

git_sha.description: Full git SHA of HEAD when the experiment ran

timestamp.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of when eval completed

config.description: All harness configuration values used for this run

elo_k.description: Selected ELO K (winner of grid search)

elo_home_adv.description: Selected ELO HOME_ADV (winner of grid search)

naive_brier.description: Multiclass Brier of the naive (home-prior) baseline, averaged over test seasons

ab_sets.description: Per-AB-set Brier score averaged over test seasons (key = AB_SETS name, value = Brier)

best_model.description: Key from results dict for the best-performing model (e.g. 'ens_stacked_brier')

best_brier.description: Brier of the best model, averaged over test seasons. LOWER IS BETTER.

improvement_pct_vs_naive.description: Percentage improvement of best_brier over naive_brier. NEGATIVE IS BETTER (lower Brier).

max_decile_calibration_error.description: Max absolute decile calibration error (home-win class, stacked ensemble). Target < 0.05.

per_season.description: Best model Brier per test season (key = year string)
